value.body:
## Context

Cycle is local-first and stores important state in app config, SQLite projection state, and GitDB refs. Production use requires explicit recovery paths.

## Outcome

Provide safe migration, backup, validation, and repair tools for app config versions, projection rebuilds, missing refs, and invalid repository metadata.

## Acceptance criteria

- App config migrations are versioned, tested, and backed up before destructive changes.
- Projection rebuild can be triggered per repository and reports warnings/failures.
- Missing or stale GitDB refs have a non-destructive initialization/repair path.
- Repair actions are available from backend/CLI and surfaced in desktop where useful.
- Tests cover migration success, rollback/backup, projection rebuild, and missing-ref repair.

frontmatter.title: Add data repair and migration tooling for config, projection, and GitDB state

value.title: Add data repair and migration tooling for config, projection, and GitDB state
